creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 149589
x11-toolkits/iwidgets request for maintainership [PATCH]

This is in response to a post from the current maintainer on
freebsd-ports@
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-November/096586.html
as well as to our conversation off list.

The attached svn(1) diff(1) says it all. :)

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
